description: ApplyBoard is a platform for international student recruitment and study-abroad applications, connecting students, recruitment partners, and educational institutions. It also operates ApplyProof, a document verification solution for international student documentation.
summary: ApplyBoard exposes a public MCP server at https://www.applyboard.com/mcp/search/mcp and no other public developer-facing HTTP, GraphQL, or CLI integration surfaces were found on applyboard.com.
